data.title: dso-setup.sh: erroneous auto-install block in detect_prerequisites causes CI failures (d10654da)
data.description: Commit d10654da added an auto-install block inside detect_prerequisites() that runs 'brew install / apt-get install' unconditionally before prerequisite checks. This broke test_prereq_missing_precommit_warning and test_prereq_missing_python3_warning in CI on ubuntu-24.04 (typo 'pyrhon', wrong function, blocking behavior). Fix: remove the block from detect_prerequisites() entirely — this function should detect, not install.
